title: Cast Iron Skillset - A Terramity Class Addon!
description: This addon aims to create 3 well established classes with 2 "subclasses"
body:
### Hey! You There!
This addon aims to create 3 well established classes with 2 "subclasses" branching off from the main one to create more build variety. these can come in the form of armor, weapons, or accessories. It's planned to have 21-30 weapons per class, a couple accessories, and 2-3 armor items per tier in base Terramity.

### Classes And Subclasses! :3
Fighter! 

 -Martial Artist
 
 -Berserker

 
Support!

 -Arcanist
 
 -Artificer

 
Tank!

 -Paladin
 
 -Bulwark
